highlights.summary: Vivekanand College of Nursing Bhubaneswar Admissions 2025-26 are now open. Candidates can visit the official website of the college for more information.

table.details: - Utkal University - Government Rural CHC and Urban Health Centre Mendhasal
BSc Nursing, Post Basic BSc Nursing

college_info.intro:
Vivekanand College of Nursing Bhubaneswar offers BSc Nursing, GNM Nursing, PBBSc Nursing (Post Basic BSc Nursing), and DMRT programmes to students. BSc Nursing and Post Basic BSc Nursing are among the most popular programmes offered at the institute. The BSc Nursing programme is an undergraduate programme offered for a duration of four years.
Vivekanand College of Nursing Bhubaneswar also offers practical training to students in its own hospital and other affiliated hospitals. The college also provides job-oriented skill training to students during the course duration. After completing the BSc Nursing course from Vivekanand College of Nursing, students can become Home Care Nurses, Junior Psychiatric Nurses, and Nursing Executives, or can take up several other career opportunities. BSc graduates can also work in government and private hospitals. Candidates can check the Vivekanand College of Nursing popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Vivekanand College of Nursing has a placement cell that looks after all the placement-related activities of the college. It organises various training programmes to help students develop the necessary skills required at the time of placement. Vivekanand College of Nursing assures 100% placement support. The college also provides practical exposure to students in its parent hospital, known as Vivekanand Super Speciality Hospital, and other affiliated hospitals. The college is also affiliated with the Government Rural CHC and Urban Health Centre Mendhasal to provide community health training to students.
